title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ABB India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
